programme.title: Live Premier League
programme.desc: Liverpool v Chelsea (Kick-off 12.30pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Anfield. The reverse fixture back in October saw Brazilian youngster Estevao score a 96th-minute winner for the Blues to earn them a 2-1 victory over Arne Slot's side. Moises Caicedo opened the scoring after 14 minutes before Cody Gakpo replied for Liverpool, only for Estevao to score with virutally the last kick of the game to earn Chelsea the victory.
